rulings.Case Title: PETER MURCHISON VS. HONEYWELL INTERNATIONAL, INC.
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, February 21, 2017 in Department 503, Line 1. Defendant Auto Row Parts Co.'s motion for summary judgment, or in the alternative, summary adjudication is continued on the court's own motion to February 23, 2017. = (503/CML)
